caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Rough Seas for Turks and Caicos
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos are experiencing ESE-dominant swells with a 7 s period, sustained winds up to 19 kt and seas to 5.2 ft, and 100% rain probability. I expect reduced visibility and disrupted small-boat operations at Providenciales and Grand Turk, while Grenada will see lighter breezes to 13 kt.

mediterranean.headline: Choppy Seas and Fresh NW Winds Near Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northwest winds to 24 kt, seas up to 5.7 ft and a dominant NW swell with a 6 s period; less than 10% rain probability. I advise mariners and operators in Mykonos and Cadiz (winds up to 21 kt) to expect choppy conditions, exercise caution with small craft, and monitor updated marine forecasts.
